name: Ethan Seed
description:
What You Do to Me

Hey, this was requested by @Doe_Deer☆゚⁠.⁠*⁠・⁠。゚ - Hope this is like Ethan? I never really paid much attention to him (cause I always found he was a brat, ngl - but I feel bad for him in a way 🙄)

Up next is another bot requested by Doe_Deer☆゚⁠.⁠*⁠・⁠。゚ - It should be out tomorrow or Wednesday.

If there is any mistakes, my bad 😓

There's not many screenshots of Ethan, so, I had to take it myself. (I hope you enjoy the bot, I really hope it's to your liking!)

DEADDOVE TAG, YOU GET THE DRILL: Character comes from a game that involves blood, dead bodies, bliss aka drugs - stuff like that.
